text: Created ticket Add fresh-context launch and resume adapters

Implemented fresh-context packet generation, durable launch descriptors, prepare/resume semantics, and subprocess runtime adapters for launch/resume flows. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/runtime.test.ts`, `store.test.ts`, `tools.test.ts`, and workspace typecheck.

After an external review surfaced correctness gaps, `packages/pi-ralph/extensions/domain/store.ts` and `extensions/commands/ralph.ts` were updated so review-gated runs cannot be relaunched prematurely, cancelled interactive launches append a cancelled iteration instead of leaving fake in-flight state, and manual approval waits remain operator-gated.
